title: Pause Music on Pause
description: Pauses the music while the game is paused, restoring the previous behavior to Minecraft 1.21.6 and above.
body:
![Banner for the Pause Music on Pause mod](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/pause-music-on-pause/modpage_banner.png) ![A screenshot of the Music & Sound Options menu, showing the added "Pause Music on Pause" button](https://mod-assets.upcraft.dev/promo/pause-music-on-pause/button_screenshot.png)
Minecraft 1.21.6 has changed how pausing works: it doesn't pause music anymore and there's no option to enable that again. This mod adds the "Pause Music on Pause" option in the "Music & Sound" options, it pauses the game music while the game is paused.
